languages.text: Вольный Торговец разгадал{mf||а} принцип управления антигравитационными плитами. На каждую нанесен управляющий глиф. Его активация пробуждает маяки прибытия на доступных платформах.

traits.locale_text: Вольный Торговец разгадал{mf||а} принцип управления антигравитационными плитами. На каждую нанесен управляющий глиф. Его активация пробуждает маяки прибытия на доступных платформах.

languages.text: The Rogue Trader has unravelled the control principles of the anti-gravity slabs. Each one bears a control glyph. Activating it triggers arrival beacons on the accessible slabs.
languages.original_text: Вольный Торговец разгадал{mf||а} принцип управления антигравитационными плитами. На каждую нанесен управляющий глиф. Его активация пробуждает маяки прибытия на доступных платформах.

traits.locale_text: The Rogue Trader has unravelled the control principles of the anti-gravity slabs. Each one bears a control glyph. Activating it awakens arrival beacons on the accessible slabs.
The Rogue Trader has unravelled the control principles of the anti-gravity slabs. Each one bears a control glyph. Activating it awakens arrival beacons on the accessible slabs.
The Rogue Trader has unravelled the control principles of the anti-gravity slabs. Each one bears a control glyph. Activating it triggers arrival beacons on the accessible slabs.
The Rogue Trader has unravelled the control principles of the anti-gravity slabs. Each one bears a control glyph. Activating it triggers arrival beacons on the accessible slabs.

languages.text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} hat die Steuerungsprinzipien der schwebenden Plattformen verstanden. Jede Plattform hat eine Kontrollglyphe. Ihre Aktivierung schaltet Ankunftsbaken der zugänglichen Plattformen frei.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has unravelled the control principles of the anti-gravity slabs. Each one bears a control glyph. Activating it triggers arrival beacons on the accessible slabs.

traits.locale_text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} hat die Steuerungsprinzipien der schwebenden Plattformen verstanden. Jede Plattform hat eine Kontrollglyphe. Ihre Aktivierung schaltet Ankunftsbaken der zugänglichen Plattformen frei.

languages.text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a découvert comment fonctionnent les dalles antigravité. Chacune porte un glyphe de contrôle. Si on l'active, des repères s'allument sur les dalles accessibles.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has unravelled the control principles of the anti-gravity slabs. Each one bears a control glyph. Activating it triggers arrival beacons on the accessible slabs.

traits.locale_text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a découvert comment fonctionnent les dalles antigravité. Chacune porte un glyphe de contrôle. Si on l'active, des repères s'allument sur les dalles accessibles.

languages.text: 行商浪人弄懂了反重力平台的控制原理。每块平台上都有一个控制符文。激活它，就会触发所有可通行平台上的信标。
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has unravelled the control principles of the anti-gravity slabs. Each one bears a control glyph. Activating it triggers arrival beacons on the accessible slabs.

traits.locale_text: 行商浪人弄懂了反重力平台的控制原理。每块平台上都有一个控制符文。激活它，就会触发所有可通行平台上的信标。

languages.text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha desentrañado los principios de control de las losas de antigravedad. Cada una lleva un glifo de control. Activarlo conecta balizas de llegada en las losas accesibles.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has unravelled the control principles of the anti-gravity slabs. Each one bears a control glyph. Activating it triggers arrival beacons on the accessible slabs.

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha desentrañado los principios de control de las losas de antigravedad. Cada una lleva un glifo de control. Activarlo conecta balizas de llegada en las losas accesibles.

languages.text: フリー・トレーダーは反重力プレートの制御方法を発見した。それぞれのプレートにはコントロールグリフが刻印されている。それを作動させると、利用可能なプラットフォームの到着ビーコンが目覚める。
languages.original_text: The Free Trader has figured out how to control the antigravity plates. Each one has a control glyph imprinted on it. Activating it awakens the arrival beacons on the available platforms.

languages.text: Hür Tacir, yer çekimi karşıtı tabakaların kontrol prensiplerini çözdü. Her biri bir kontrol glifi taşıyor. Bunu etkinleştirmek, erişilebilir tabakalardaki varış işaretçilerini tetikler.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has unravelled the control principles of the anti-gravity slabs. Each one bears a control glyph. Activating it triggers arrival beacons on the accessible slabs.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir, yer çekimi karşıtı tabakaların kontrol prensiplerini çözdü. Her biri bir kontrol glifi taşıyor. Bunu etkinleştirmek, erişilebilir tabakalardaki varış işaretçilerini tetikler.
